my_thoughts: The confirmation works: all three (three sides), approach determines manifestation (some take philosophically/theoretically/practically). The student asked classification question (seeking complete picture), which shows they understand: school = one kind (classification). They'll likely ask about relation next.
accumulated_insight: T3: Student asked classification question ('Would this school be of all three kinds or only one?')—seeking complete picture via asks for classification and category seeking. They understand: school = one kind (classification). The none mechanism confirms: all three (three sides), approach determines manifestation (some take philosophically/theoretically/practically) ('I think it is better to say all three. It has three sides. Also, some people take the system philosophically, others theoretically and yet others practically. You must not forget that the same thing can be taken in different ways'). Pattern: conceptual shift → validation → intellectual question → clarification → kinds question → confirmation → [next: relation question]. They're grasping: school = all three sides, approach = determines manifestation (confirmation).
